name: 棍棒
shooting_angle: various including handheld grip, swinging motion from side, and flying trajectory
readable_text_policy: 不添加文字标签、logo、水印或说明字
scale_policy: full length visible with human hand or arm as scale anchor
reference_context_policy: isolated on neutral background with partial human arm holding for scale, no full body or stranger faces
reference_prompt: A realistic 1.5 meter long straight wooden stick, rough wood texture in brown color, held in a human hand for scale reference, isolated on plain background, no text or additional elements, focus on full length and grip position.。源记录硬约束：数量:8；位置:家丁手中；运动政策:挥动
